title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 335.096 - Penalty for violation
text:
335.096.  Penalty for violation. — Any person who violates any of the provisions of this chapter is guilty of a class E felony and, upon conviction, shall be punished as provided by law.
(L. 1975 S.B. 108 § 18, A.L. 1981 S.B. 16, A.L. 2007 H.B. 780 merged with S.B. 308, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Effective 1-01-17
